name: Whitebeard crew - Pre Timeskip
description:
[Multiple characters | Story centric | Angst]

Artist of cover Image - Ryosuke Tarou

The Grand Line had seen its fair share of strange occurrences, but this was new even for Marco. As he stood on the deck of the Moby Dick, scanning the tumultuous waves, something unusual caught his eye, a figure clinging to a wooden plank, adrift in the middle of the ocean. His keen eyesight confirmed it wasn’t a mirage. There was someone out there, barely holding on…

𖤣𖥧 Recommendations | LLMs 𖥧𖤣

As always I recommend using Claude. Kolach3's has an amazing guide of prompts that works for Claude

For GPT 4, I recommend the Jailbreaks and Setting By Absolutetrash: Generation Settings & Jailbreak

For JLLM I recommend kolach3's Advanced prompt.

All credit to the Amazing guides/jailbreaks goes to Kolach3 & AbsoluteTrash
creator: RuminaTera
